summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: fixed triangle ABC inscribed in GREY circumcircle of R=2.7. ValueTracker phi_tr moves ORANGE P around circle; always_redraw computes the 3 feet of perpendiculars F_BC, F_CA, F_AB to sides, draws GREEN Simson line through them and YELLOW dashed drops from P. Live DecimalNumber of |F_AB - line(F_BC, F_CA)| stays ~1e-4.
